name: Shangri-La Editorial Desk
shortBio: Maintains Shangri-La coverage with a focus on altitude pacing, highland town rhythm, and when Yunnan becomes less decorative and more interior.
fullBio: The Shangri-La Editorial Desk maintains guides and planning coverage related to Shangri-La. Its focus is helping readers judge when the higher plateau genuinely belongs in their Yunnan route, how altitude and slower mornings change the stay, and how Dukezong, Songzanlin, and the wider Diqing highland mood create a different register from Lijiang's easier beauty.
reviewProcess: Pages are reviewed for route fit, altitude realism, seasonal practicality, and whether the advice still matches current Shangri-La planning conditions and broader Yunnan highland travel patterns.
seoTitle: Shangri-La Editorial Desk | China Travel Notes
seoDescription: Meet the desk that maintains Shangri-La guides and planning coverage on China Travel Notes.
